tasks.title: Implement user authentication
tasks.description: Implement user authentication using FastAPI and PostgreSQL
tasks.code_stub:
def authenticate_user(username: str, password: str) -> bool:
    # Purpose: Authenticate user
    # Args: username (str), password (str)
    # Returns: bool
    # TODO: implement authentication logic
    user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
    if user and user.check_password(password):
        return True
    return False

tasks.title: Implement role-based access control
tasks.description: Implement role-based access control for documents
tasks.code_stub:
def check_access(user: User, document: Document) -> bool:
    # Purpose: Check access to document
    # Args: user (User), document (Document)
    # Returns: bool
    # TODO: implement access control logic
    if user.role == 'owner' or user.role == 'editor':
        return True
    return False
acceptance_criteria: Users can only access documents with correct role
